name: aegis-qvac
description: Aegis — a fully on-device, private health companion built on the QVAC SDK + MedPsy. Research/education use only; not a medical device.
//deps-note: Addon packages (ocr-onnx, lib-infer-parakeet/whispercpp STT, lib-infer-onnx-tts, lib-infer-llamacpp-embed, rag) to be pinned once exact names/versions are confirmed from docs.qvac.tether.io / Discord. Do NOT guess versions.
